parameters.sqlQuery:
-- ============================================================
-- CAMPAIGN TRACKER â€” Targets T2/DEMAND
-- CampaÃ±a: DOUBLE DATES (2026-04-20 â†’ 2026-05-05)
-- TO dates: 2026-04-27, 2026-05-05
-- Para nueva campaÃ±a: actualizar fechas, TO_DATES, filtros
-- ============================================================

WITH

CAMPAIGN_DATES AS (
  SELECT
    date,
    FORMAT_DATE('%w', date) AS dow,
    date IN ('2026-04-27', '2026-05-05') AS is_to
  FROM UNNEST(GENERATE_DATE_ARRAY(
    DATE '2026-04-20', DATE '2026-05-05', INTERVAL 1 DAY
  )) AS date
),

TS_SESSIONS AS (
  SELECT CAST(fecha AS DATE) AS date, SUM(sesiones_plan) AS sessions
  FROM `meli-sbox.PLANNINGMLA.KPIS_MLA_MKT`
  WHERE fecha IS NOT NULL AND sesiones_plan IS NOT NULL
    AND CAST(fecha AS DATE) BETWEEN DATE '2026-04-20' AND DATE '2026-05-05'
  GROUP BY 1
),

TS_NMV AS (
  SELECT CAST(fecha AS DATE) AS date, SUM(PLAN.TGMV_USD) AS nmv
  FROM `meli-sbox.PLANNINGMLA.DM_TARGETS_MLA`
  WHERE fecha IS NOT NULL AND PLAN.TGMV_USD IS NOT NULL
    AND CAST(fecha AS DATE) BETWEEN DATE '2026-04-20' AND DATE '2026-05-05'
  GROUP BY 1
),

LANDING_NO_TO AS (
  SELECT
    FORMAT_DATE('%w', t.DATE) AS dow,
    AVG(t.NOT_LOG_USERS)       AS usuarios_landing,
    AVG(t.SESSIONS)            AS sessions,
    AVG(t.LISTADO_TOTAL_USERS) AS ses_contenedor,
    AVG(t.VPP_TOTAL_USERS)     AS ses_vip,
    AVG(t.SI_168HS)            AS nsi,
    AVG(t.TRANSACTIONS_168HS)  AS transacciones,
    AVG(t.NMV_168HS)           AS nmv
  FROM (
    SELECT
      t.DATE,
      SUM(t.NOT_LOG_USERS)        AS NOT_LOG_USERS,
      SUM(t.SESSIONS)             AS SESSIONS,
      SUM(t.LISTADO_TOTAL_USERS)  AS LISTADO_TOTAL_USERS,
      SUM(t.VPP_TOTAL_USERS)      AS VPP_TOTAL_USERS,
      SUM(t.SI_168HS)             AS SI_168HS,
      SUM(t.TRANSACTIONS_168HS)   AS TRANSACTIONS_168HS,
      SUM(t.NMV_168HS)            AS NMV_168HS
    FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.DM_LANDING_ATTRIBUTION_CONTAINER_DEAL` t
    WHERE t.SITE = 'MLA'
      AND t.LANDING_NAME IN (
        '2-2 descuentos', '3 3 descuentos', 'MLA1246', 'MLA1430',
        'descuentazos', 'dia de la madre', 'dia del nino',
        'dia-del-padre', 'gangas', 'ofertas de verano',
        'ofertas futboleras', 'rebajas-de-invierno',
        'supermercado', 'verano de descuentos', 'vuelta-a-clases', 'liquidacion total'
      )
      AND t.DATE NOT IN (
        '2026-03-09', '2026-03-10', '2026-03-11',
        '2026-03-12', '2026-03-13', '2026-03-14', '2026-03-15',
        '2025-12-10', '2025-12-11', '2025-12-12',
        '2026-02-02', '2026-02-12',
        '2026-02-24', '2026-03-03',
        '2026-03-30', '2026-04-04',
        '2026-04-27', '2026-05-05'
      )
    GROUP BY t.DATE
  ) t
  GROUP BY 1
),

LANDING_TO AS (
  SELECT
    FORMAT_DATE('%w', t.DATE) AS dow,
    AVG(t.NOT_LOG_USERS)       AS usuarios_landing,
    AVG(t.SESSIONS)            AS sessions,
    AVG(t.LISTADO_TOTAL_USERS) AS ses_contenedor,
    AVG(t.VPP_TOTAL_USERS)     AS ses_vip,
    AVG(t.SI_168HS)            AS nsi,
    AVG(t.TRANSACTIONS_168HS)  AS transacciones,
    AVG(t.NMV_168HS)           AS nmv
  FROM (
    SELECT
      t.DATE,
      SUM(t.NOT_LOG_USERS)        AS NOT_LOG_USERS,
      SUM(t.SESSIONS)             AS SESSIONS,
      SUM(t.LISTADO_TOTAL_USERS)  AS LISTADO_TOTAL_USERS,
      SUM(t.VPP_TOTAL_USERS)      AS VPP_TOTAL_USERS,
      SUM(t.SI_168HS)             AS SI_168HS,
      SUM(t.TRANSACTIONS_168HS)   AS TRANSACTIONS_168HS,
      SUM(t.NMV_168HS)            AS NMV_168HS
    FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.DM_LANDING_ATTRIBUTION_CONTAINER_DEAL` t
    WHERE t.SITE = 'MLA'
      AND t.LANDING_NAME IN (
        '2 2 descuentos parcial', '3 3 descuentos parcial',
        '4-4-descuentos-parcial',
        '5-5-descuentos-parcial', '5 5 descuentos parcial'
      )
      AND t.DATE IN (
        '2026-03-09', '2026-03-10', '2026-03-11',
        '2026-03-12', '2026-03-13', '2026-03-14', '2026-03-15',
        '2025-12-10', '2025-12-11', '2025-12-12',
        '2026-02-02', '2026-02-12',
        '2026-02-24', '2026-03-03',
        '2026-03-30', '2026-04-04',
        '2026-04-27', '2026-05-05'
      )
    GROUP BY t.DATE
  ) t
  GROUP BY 1
),

CONTAINER_NO_TO AS (
  SELECT
    FORMAT_DATE('%w', DATE) AS dow,
    AVG(SUM_C)  AS sessions,
    AVG(SUM_V)  AS ses_vip,
    AVG(SUM_NSI) AS nsi,
    AVG(SUM_TRX) AS transacciones
  FROM (
    SELECT DATE,
      SUM(C_UNIQUE_SESSION)  AS SUM_C,
      SUM(V_UNIQUE_SESSION)  AS SUM_V,
      SUM(SI_168HS)          AS SUM_NSI,
      SUM(TRANSACTION_168HS) AS SUM_TRX
    FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.DM_CONTAINERS_DEALS_ATTRIBUTION`
    WHERE SITE = 'MLA'
      AND (
        UPPER(CONTAINER_NAME) LIKE 'MK T2%'
        OR UPPER(CONTAINER_NAME) LIKE 'MKP T2%'
        OR UPPER(CONTAINER_NAME) LIKE 'MKP DEMAND%'
      )
      AND DATE NOT IN (
        '2026-03-09', '2026-03-10', '2026-03-11',
        '2026-03-12', '2026-03-13', '2026-03-14', '2026-03-15',
        '2025-12-10', '2025-12-11', '2025-12-12',
        '2026-02-02', '2026-02-12',
        '2026-02-24', '2026-03-03',
        '2026-03-30', '2026-04-04',
        '2026-04-27', '2026-05-05'
      )
    GROUP BY DATE
  )
  GROUP BY 1
),

CONTAINER_TO AS (
  SELECT
    FORMAT_DATE('%w', DATE) AS dow,
    AVG(SUM_C)  AS sessions,
    AVG(SUM_V)  AS ses_vip,
    AVG(SUM_NSI) AS nsi,
    AVG(SUM_TRX) AS transacciones
  FROM (
    SELECT DATE,
      SUM(C_UNIQUE_SESSION)  AS SUM_C,
      SUM(V_UNIQUE_SESSION)  AS SUM_V,
      SUM(SI_168HS)          AS SUM_NSI,
      SUM(TRANSACTION_168HS) AS SUM_TRX
    FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.DM_CONTAINERS_DEALS_ATTRIBUTION`
    WHERE SITE = 'MLA'
      AND (
        UPPER(CONTAINER_NAME) LIKE 'MK T2%'
        OR UPPER(CONTAINER_NAME) LIKE 'MKP T2%'
        OR UPPER(CONTAINER_NAME) LIKE 'MKP DEMAND%'
      )
      AND DATE IN (
        '2026-03-09', '2026-03-10', '2026-03-11',
        '2026-03-12', '2026-03-13', '2026-03-14', '2026-03-15',
        '2025-12-10', '2025-12-11', '2025-12-12',
        '2026-02-02', '2026-02-12',
        '2026-02-24', '2026-03-03',
        '2026-03-30', '2026-04-04',
        '2026-04-27', '2026-05-05'
      )
    GROUP BY DATE
  )
  GROUP BY 1
),

NASP AS (
  SELECT ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(NMV_LAST_30DAYS), SUM(NSI_LAST_30DAYS)), 2) AS nasp
  FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.LK_MKP_CONTAINER_BY_QUERY`
  WHERE SIT_SITE_ID = 'MLA'
    AND DOM_DOMAIN_AGG1 IS NOT NULL
    AND DOM_DOMAIN_AGG1 IN (
      'TELEVISIONS & STREAMING DEVICES', 'AUDIO & GENERAL ELECTRONICS',
      'CONSOLE GAMING HARDWARE', 'FOOTBALL', 'FURNITURE',
      'FOODS', 'DRINKS', 'APPAREL', 'FOOTWEAR'
    )
  HAVING SUM(NSI_LAST_30DAYS) > 0
),

MS_CTR AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN LOWER(LINE_ITEM_NAME) LIKE '%tachado%' OR LOWER(LINE_ITEM_NAME) LIKE '%celebrity%' THEN 'PRINCIPAL'
      WHEN LOWER(LINE_ITEM_NAME) LIKE '%alta%' THEN 'HIGH'
      WHEN LOWER(LINE_ITEM_NAME) LIKE '%media%' THEN 'MID'
      ELSE 'OTHER'
    END AS bucket,
    SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(CLICKS_QTY), NULLIF(SUM(IMPRESSION_VIEWS_QTY), 0)) AS ctr
  FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.BT_ADS_DISP_METRICS_DAILY`
  WHERE EVENT_LOCAL_DT BETWEEN '2026-01-01' AND CURRENT_DATE()
    AND SIT_SITE_ID IN ('MLA')
    AND PLACEMENT LIKE '%MAIN-SLIDER%'
    AND ACCOUNT_NAME LIKE '%MARKETING%'
    AND LINE_ITEM_NAME NOT LIKE '%SPLINTER%'
    AND CAMPAIGN_NAME NOT LIKE '%FD%'
  GROUP BY 1
),

TARGETS_BY_DATE AS (
  SELECT
    cd.date,
    cd.is_to,
    COALESCE(ts_s.sessions, 0)                                                                            AS ts_sessions,
    COALESCE(ts_n.nmv, 0)                                                                                 AS ts_nmv,
    COALESCE(IF(cd.is_to, l_to.usuarios_landing, l_no.usuarios_landing), 0)                              AS ldg_usuarios,
    COALESCE(IF(cd.is_to, l_to.sessions,          l_no.sessions),         0)                              AS ldg_sessions,
    COALESCE(IF(cd.is_to, l_to.ses_contenedor,    l_no.ses_contenedor),   0)                              AS ldg_ses_cont,
    COALESCE(IF(cd.is_to, l_to.ses_vip,           l_no.ses_vip),          0)                              AS ldg_ses_vip,
    COALESCE(IF(cd.is_to, l_to.nsi,               l_no.nsi),              0)                              AS ldg_nsi,
    COALESCE(IF(cd.is_to, l_to.transacciones,     l_no.transacciones),    0)                              AS ldg_trx,
    COALESCE(IF(cd.is_to, l_to.nmv,               l_no.nmv),              0)                              AS ldg_nmv,
    COALESCE(IF(cd.is_to, c_to.sessions,          c_no.sessions),         0)                              AS cnt_sessions,
    COALESCE(IF(cd.is_to, c_to.ses_vip,           c_no.ses_vip),          0)                              AS cnt_ses_vip,
    COALESCE(IF(cd.is_to, c_to.nsi,               c_no.nsi),              0)                              AS cnt_nsi,
    COALESCE(IF(cd.is_to, c_to.transacciones,     c_no.transacciones),    0)                              AS cnt_trx
  FROM CAMPAIGN_DATES cd
  LEFT JOIN TS_SESSIONS     ts_s ON cd.date = ts_s.date
  LEFT JOIN TS_NMV          ts_n ON cd.date = ts_n.date
  LEFT JOIN LANDING_NO_TO   l_no ON cd.dow  = l_no.dow
  LEFT JOIN LANDING_TO      l_to ON cd.dow  = l_to.dow
  LEFT JOIN CONTAINER_NO_TO c_no ON cd.dow  = c_no.dow
  LEFT JOIN CONTAINER_TO    c_to ON cd.dow  = c_to.dow
)

SELECT TO_BASE64(CAST(CONCAT(
  '{"dates":',         (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(CAST(date AS STRING) ORDER BY date)) FROM TARGETS_BY_DATE),
  ',"to_dates":["2026-04-27","2026-05-05"]',
  ',"ms":{',
    '"ctr_all":',       (SELECT ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(CLICKS_QTY),NULLIF(SUM(IMPRESSION_VIEWS_QTY),0)),4) FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.BT_ADS_DISP_METRICS_DAILY` WHERE EVENT_LOCAL_DT BETWEEN '2026-01-01' AND CURRENT_DATE() AND SIT_SITE_ID IN ('MLA') AND PLACEMENT LIKE '%MAIN-SLIDER%' AND ACCOUNT_NAME LIKE '%MARKETING%' AND LINE_ITEM_NAME NOT LIKE '%SPLINTER%' AND CAMPAIGN_NAME NOT LIKE '%FD%'),
    ',"ctr_principal":', (SELECT ROUND(MAX(IF(bucket='PRINCIPAL',ctr,NULL)),4) FROM MS_CTR),
    ',"ctr_high":',      (SELECT ROUND(MAX(IF(bucket='HIGH',ctr,NULL)),4) FROM MS_CTR),
    ',"ctr_mid":',       (SELECT ROUND(MAX(IF(bucket='MID',ctr,NULL)),4) FROM MS_CTR),
  '}',
  ',"total_site":{"sessions":', (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(ROUND(ts_sessions,0) ORDER BY date)) FROM TARGETS_BY_DATE),
    ',"nmv":',                  (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(ROUND(ts_nmv,0) ORDER BY date)) FROM TARGETS_BY_DATE),
  '}',
  ',"landing":{"sessions":',       (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(ROUND(ldg_sessions,0) ORDER BY date)) FROM TARGETS_BY_DATE),
    ',"usuarios_landing":',         (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(ROUND(ldg_usuarios,0) ORDER BY date)) FROM TARGETS_BY_DATE),
    ',"ses_contenedor":',           (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(ROUND(ldg_ses_cont,0) ORDER BY date)) FROM TARGETS_BY_DATE),
    ',"ses_vip":',                  (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(ROUND(ldg_ses_vip,0) ORDER BY date)) FROM TARGETS_BY_DATE),
    ',"nsi":',                      (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(ROUND(ldg_nsi,0) ORDER BY date)) FROM TARGETS_BY_DATE),
    ',"transacciones":',            (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(ROUND(ldg_trx,0) ORDER BY date)) FROM TARGETS_BY_DATE),
    ',"nmv":',                      (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(ROUND(ldg_nmv,0) ORDER BY date)) FROM TARGETS_BY_DATE),
  '}',
  ',"container":{"sessions":',      (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(ROUND(cnt_sessions,0) ORDER BY date)) FROM TARGETS_BY_DATE),
    ',"ses_vip":',                  (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(ROUND(cnt_ses_vip,0) ORDER BY date)) FROM TARGETS_BY_DATE),
    ',"nsi":',                      (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(ROUND(cnt_nsi,0) ORDER BY date)) FROM TARGETS_BY_DATE),
    ',"transacciones":',            (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(ROUND(cnt_trx,0) ORDER BY date)) FROM TARGETS_BY_DATE),
  '}',
  ',"nasp":', (SELECT CAST(nasp AS STRING) FROM NASP),
  ',"refreshed_at":"', FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), 'America/Argentina/Buenos_Aires'), '"}'
) AS BYTES)) AS data_b64
